headline: Iron Mountain Inc (NYSE:IRM) Scores Perfect 9/9 in Technical Breakout Setup Screen
summary: Iron Mountain (IRM) scores 9/10 on technical strength and setup quality, offering a clean breakout entry near $128.86 with defined risk.
